update_profile_success: Profile updated successfully, please log in again.
change_password-tips: Keep the password empty if you don't want to change it
confirm_password-tips: Repeat the password that you just input
confirm_password_not_same: The passwords you entered do not match
scan_qr: Scan the QR code to save the secret key
or_manual: Or input the secret key manually
input_code: Input the code from your 2FA app
guest-tips: You are currently visiting as a guest.
modify_nothing: So you cannot modify anything in the manage page.
webauthn_not_supported: Passkey is not supported in your browser or your origin is not secure
upgrade_to_passkey_success: Updated to passkey successfully and removed the legacy key.
upgrade_to_passkey_keep_old: Passkey updated, but failed to remove the legacy key. The legacy key is kept.
passkey_add_blocked_by_legacy: Legacy security key detected. Please upgrade it or delete it before adding a new passkey.
